titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

segments: اَلصَّلاَةِ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ قَائِماً فَيَنْسَى كِيسَهُ أَوْ مَتَاعَهُ يَخَافُ ضَيْعَتَهُ أَوْ هَلاَكَهُ قَالَ «يَقْطَعُ صَلاَتَهُ وَ يُحْرِزُ مَتَاعَهُ» قَالَ قُلْتُ فَتَفَلَّتُ عَلَيْهِ دَابَّتُهُ فَيَخَافُ أَنْ تَذْهَبَ أَوْ يُصِيبَهُ فِيهَا عَنَتٌ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يَقْطَعَ صَلاَتَهُ وَ يُحْرِزَ وَ يَعُودَ إِلَى صَلاَتِهِ.
arabic.text: اَلصَّلاَةِ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ قَائِماً فَيَنْسَى كِيسَهُ أَوْ مَتَاعَهُ يَخَافُ ضَيْعَتَهُ أَوْ هَلاَكَهُ قَالَ «يَقْطَعُ صَلاَتَهُ وَ يُحْرِزُ مَتَاعَهُ» قَالَ قُلْتُ فَتَفَلَّتُ عَلَيْهِ دَابَّتُهُ فَيَخَافُ أَنْ تَذْهَبَ أَوْ يُصِيبَهُ فِيهَا عَنَتٌ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يَقْطَعَ صَلاَتَهُ وَ يُحْرِزَ وَ يَعُودَ إِلَى صَلاَتِهِ.

segments:
Hadith.1071 - Sama’a ibn Mehran asked him about a man who is performing the obligatory prayer while standing and forgets his bag or belongings, fearing they might be lost or damaged.
Imam (as) said: "He may cut his prayer and secure his belongings."
Sama’a then said: "What if his animal breaks loose and he fears it might run away or cause harm?"
Imam (as) said: "It is no problem for him to cut his prayer, secure his animal, and then return to his prayer."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1071 - Sama’a ibn Mehran asked him about a man who is performing the obligatory prayer while standing and forgets his bag or belongings, fearing they might be lost or damaged.
Imam (as) said: "He may cut his prayer and secure his belongings."
Sama’a then said: "What if his animal breaks loose and he fears it might run away or cause harm?"
Imam (as) said: "It is no problem for him to cut his prayer, secure his animal, and then return to his prayer."

narratorChain.raw: 1071 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَمَاعَةُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ فِي

titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

segments: «يُلْقِيهَا عَنْهُ إِنْ شَاءَ أَوْ يَدْفِنُهَا فِي اَلْحَصَى.
arabic.text: «يُلْقِيهَا عَنْهُ إِنْ شَاءَ أَوْ يَدْفِنُهَا فِي اَلْحَصَى.

segments:
Hadith.1068 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about a person who is harmed by an animal while he is praying.
He (as) replied: "He should throw it away from him if he wishes, or bury it in the pebbles."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1068 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about a person who is harmed by an animal while he is praying.
He (as) replied: "He should throw it away from him if he wishes, or bury it in the pebbles."

narratorChain.raw: 1068 - وَ سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ تُؤْذِيهِ اَلدَّابَّةُ وَ هُوَ يُصَلِّي قَالَ

parts.text: سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ:

titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

segments: Hadith.1069 - Al-Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a person who scratches himself while in prayer. He (as) replied: "There is no harm."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.1069 - Al-Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a person who scratches himself while in prayer. He (as) replied: "There is no harm."

narratorChain.raw: 1069 - وَ سَأَلَ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَحْتَكُّ وَ هُوَ فِي

parts.text: سَأَلَ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ:

titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

segments: اَلصَّلاَةِ أَ يَنْقُضُ ذَلِكَ صَلاَتَهُ وَ وُضُوءَهُ قَالَ «لاَ.
arabic.text: اَلصَّلاَةِ أَ يَنْقُضُ ذَلِكَ صَلاَتَهُ وَ وُضُوءَهُ قَالَ «لاَ.

segments:
Hadith.1070 - He asked him about a person who kills a louse, a flea, a mosquito, or a fly while in prayer. Does this invalidate his prayer and wudu?
Imam (as) said: "No."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1070 - He asked him about a person who kills a louse, a flea, a mosquito, or a fly while in prayer. Does this invalidate his prayer and wudu?
Imam (as) said: "No."

narratorChain.raw: 1070 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَقْتُلُ اَلْبَقَّةَ وَ اَلْبُرْغُوثَ وَ اَلْقَمْلَةَ وَ اَلذُّبَابَ وَ هُوَ فِي

titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

segments: اَلصَّلاَةِ فَيَرَى حَيَّةً بِحِيَالِهِ هَلْ يَجُوزُ لَهُ أَنْ يَتَنَاوَلَهَا وَ يَقْتُلَهَا قَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ بَيْنَهَا وَ بَيْنَهُ خُطْوَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ فَلْيَخْطُ وَ يَقْتُلُهَا وَ إِلاَّ فَلاَ.
arabic.text: اَلصَّلاَةِ فَيَرَى حَيَّةً بِحِيَالِهِ هَلْ يَجُوزُ لَهُ أَنْ يَتَنَاوَلَهَا وَ يَقْتُلَهَا قَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ بَيْنَهَا وَ بَيْنَهُ خُطْوَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ فَلْيَخْطُ وَ يَقْتُلُهَا وَ إِلاَّ فَلاَ.

segments:
Hadith.1072 - Ammar al-Sabati asked him about a man who is in prayer and sees a snake in front of him. Is it permissible for him to step forward and kill it?
Imam (as) said: "If there is just one step between him and the snake, then he may step forward and kill it; otherwise, he should not."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1072 - Ammar al-Sabati asked him about a man who is in prayer and sees a snake in front of him. Is it permissible for him to step forward and kill it?
Imam (as) said: "If there is just one step between him and the snake, then he may step forward and kill it; otherwise, he should not."

narratorChain.raw: 1072 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَمَّارٌ اَلسَّابَاطِيُّ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ فِي

titles.ar: باب - المصلي تعرض له السباع والهوام فيقتلها
titles.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

segments: : «إِذَا كُنْتَ فِي صَلاَةِ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ فَرَأَيْتَ غُلاَماً لَكَ قَدْ أَبَقَ أَوْ غَرِيماً لَكَ عَلَيْهِ مَالٌ أَوْ حَيَّةً تَتَخَوَّفُهَا عَلَى نَفْسِكَ فَاقْطَعِ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ اِتْبَعْ غُلاَمَكَ أَوْ غَرِيمَكَ وَ اُقْتُلِ اَلْحَيَّةَ.
arabic.text: : «إِذَا كُنْتَ فِي صَلاَةِ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ فَرَأَيْتَ غُلاَماً لَكَ قَدْ أَبَقَ أَوْ غَرِيماً لَكَ عَلَيْهِ مَالٌ أَوْ حَيَّةً تَتَخَوَّفُهَا عَلَى نَفْسِكَ فَاقْطَعِ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ اِتْبَعْ غُلاَمَكَ أَوْ غَرِيمَكَ وَ اُقْتُلِ اَلْحَيَّةَ.

segments:
Hadith.1073 - Hariz narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"If you are in the obligatory prayer and you see one of your servants who has run away, or a debtor to whom you owe money, or a snake that you fear for your life, then break your prayer, follow your servant or debtor, and kill the snake."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1073 - Hariz narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"If you are in the obligatory prayer and you see one of your servants who has run away, or a debtor to whom you owe money, or a snake that you fear for your life, then break your prayer, follow your servant or debtor, and kill the snake."

narratorChain.raw: 1073 - وَ رَوَى حَرِيزٌ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
